name: Blackstone Secured Lending Fund
business: Blackstone Secured Lending Fund is a business development company that originates secured debt investments, primarily first lien senior secured and unitranche loans, to U.S. private companies. The company aims to generate current income and long-term capital appreciation by investing in floating-rate, senior secured loans. It is externally managed by Blackstone Private Credit Strategies LLC and Blackstone Credit BDC Advisors LLC.
